title: Normalize repos and verify deploys
description: Reconcile all local Centaur and centaur-overlay work without loss, get canonical checkouts clean on main, push authorized work, verify required CI and production Argo deployments are green.
acceptance_criteria: Both local repositories are clean on main and match origin/main; no dirty worktree contains unpushed work; relevant CI is green; production Centaur deployment is Synced/Healthy with ready endpoints.

title: Reduce Centaur OMP fork delta
description: Audit Darkmatter-only Centaur code now redundant with native OMP RPC collaboration, subagent, export, stats, and session lifecycle ownership. Produce exact deletion/migration plan and implement high-confidence clean cutover.
notes: Audit 2026-07-22: current fork delta vs upstream/main is 89 files, +23,341/-6,409 (net +16,932). OMP collaboration concentrates in commits #16 b46a1a0a (+1,159 net ownership), #17 80b22634 (+1,019 relay), #18 803734e1 (+1,468 Slack/API command), #19 54a213bf (+3,267 resident adapter), #21 c6bdc849 (+6,495 lifecycle), #30 73826ee3 (+281 renewals). Retain #19 adapter: native OMP RPC is not App Server wire-compatible. Retain durable ownership fencing unless session-host ownership is generalized. Primary reduction: replace #21 room-specific state machine with one resident SessionPipe/OMP host per session; query native collab state live, kill/recreate host on stop failure, tie room death to pipe EOF. Expected removal 4.5-6k net. Move collab-relay out of engine after GitOps cutover (~1,019 net). Optional consolidate one-shot OMP path (~0.8-1.2k). Native writable guest turns are OMP-owned and bypass session_executions; document/approve that boundary or keep current complexity.

title: Renew OMP one-shot ownership during long turns
description: Production subagent smoke proved OMP emits complete parent and child output after 135 seconds, but api-rs drops durable output at the 45-second session_owners expiry while stdout_owner continues renewing. Add generation-fenced one-shot ownership renewal for active executions and ensure terminal cleanup cannot delete a newer generation.
acceptance_criteria: An OMP one-shot execution retains the exact session ownership generation beyond the lease window; stale generations cannot renew or release successors; output after 45 seconds remains durable and turn/completed produces session.execution_completed.
close_reason: Fixed in centaur PR #30 (0cbbbb09; merge 73826ee3), deployed by gitops PR #112 (080a77b2), and production-verified with a 3m15s OMP turn: 5,320 durable output lines plus session.execution_completed and transcript archive.

title: Prototype OMP-owned subagents through Console
description: Build the smallest throwaway vertical slice proving that a Centaur Console prompt reaches a resident OMP session, OMP owns a child-agent fan-out, an OMP-native overlay hook records lifecycle observations, and the final answer returns through Centaur without a Centaur child scheduler. Keep durable step semantics out of scope until this behavior is exercised.
acceptance_criteria: A real local Console request invokes an OMP-native overlay hook and OMP child agents; lifecycle evidence identifies the parent and children; the final answer renders in Console; no Centaur code independently spawns or retries child agents.

title: Inventory every fork customization
description: Account for all 32 commits and cumulative file deltas from upstream/main to origin/main, grouping each customization by behavior and affected modules.
acceptance_criteria: A complete commit-to-capability inventory with no unclassified fork commit.

title: Audit OMP models roles and memory
description: Research OMP model roles, advisors, subscription models, config layering, tool calls, and memory backends; verify Centaur configuration and explain why exports show only GLM.
acceptance_criteria: Model selection and advisor behavior are traced end to end with exact config/code evidence and rewrite recommendations.

title: Synthesize OMP native rewrite report
description: Produce the complete evidence matrix, architecture findings, migration slices, deletions, retained Centaur responsibilities, risks, and priority ordering.
acceptance_criteria: The report accounts for every fork commit and includes exact Centaur file and OMP doc citations plus a top recommendation.

title: Audit OMP workflows tools and extensions
description: Research OMP workflows, TypeScript extensions, hooks, skills, personas, tools, host tools/URIs, and compare with Centaur Python workflows, overlay delivery, and tool plumbing.
acceptance_criteria: Every workflow/tool/extension-related customization is mapped to OMP-native options, limitations, and testability implications.

title: Audit remaining platform customizations
description: Classify non-OMP fork changes including CI, chart, console access, repo cache, GitHub token refresh, eval workspace, migrations, and security wiring; determine which are genuinely Centaur-owned.
acceptance_criteria: All remaining fork commits are classified and no platform customization is incorrectly proposed for OMP.

title: Audit OMP sessions and harness lifecycle
description: Research OMP JSONL sessions, session directories, resume/continue, RPC process lifecycle, RPC UI, persistence, and compare them with Centaur sandbox, harness-server, ownership, and transcript code.
acceptance_criteria: Every session, persistence, RPC, ownership, collaboration, and transcript customization is mapped to native OMP capability or a documented gap.

title: Audit OMP collaboration export and stats
description: Research RPC UI, collab, export_html, stats APIs, sharing, browser/port behavior, and compare with Centaur relay, viewer, console, Slack, and app proxy customizations.
acceptance_criteria: Every collaboration, export, stats, viewer, proxy, and rendering customization is classified delete/rewrite/retain with evidence.

title: Audit Centaur customizations for OMP-native rewrites
description: Inventory every Darkmatter fork commit and customization relative to paradigmxyz/centaur, research the current OMP docs and implementation, and produce an evidence-backed matrix identifying what can be deleted, moved into OMP TypeScript, or retained in Centaur.
design: Read-only architecture audit. Treat upstream/main..origin/main as the customization universe. No code/RFC changes until the user reviews the report. Default new execution surfaces to OMP-native shapes: overlays should be OMP-focused; tools should use OMP tools unless Centaur already supplies an equivalent platform capability; Centaur retains workflow ownership but workflow prompts and agent turns should exercise OMP-native orchestration; observability and durable-step integration should prefer OMP hooks. OMP is authoritative for all child-agent lifecycle within a turn. Centaur owns and durably tracks the parent workflow/session/execution and sandbox, sets bounds, observes the child tree over RPC/hooks, and aborts only through the parent boundary. The audit must systematically compare OMP’s full native tool registry against Centaur’s actual shipped sandbox/tool inventory, including credentialed wrappers, before recommending either side.
acceptance_criteria: Every fork commit is accounted for; every OMP-related customization maps to exact Centaur files and OMP-native evidence; recommendations distinguish delete/rewrite/retain and name gaps; model-role, session/PVC, RPC-UI, collaboration, export/stats, workflow, and testing concerns are explicitly resolved.

title: Make OMP ownership takeover restart-safe
description: A surviving per-sandbox harness-server retains the previous api-rs ownership tuple and rejects the next turn after a control-plane restart. Design and implement persistent monotonic session ownership plus a generation-fenced host acquisition handshake so restarts recover without a user-visible stale-owner failure.
design: Use a persistent per-session ownership row with a monotonic generation and an explicit idempotent session.owner_acquire handshake. Ownership spans the resident OMP host rather than one execution. Higher generations may rebind an idle surviving harness; active-turn takeover must adopt or wait and never replay ambiguously. Keep api-rs single-replica and defer active-active routing and exact intra-turn recovery. RFC: services/api-rs/rfcs/0006-omp-host-ownership-takeover.md.
acceptance_criteria: A completed OMP session accepts a subsequent turn after api-rs restart while preserving the sandbox; generations remain monotonic; stale owners are fenced; ownership mismatch does not terminalize a prompt that was never forwarded.
notes: User selected approach 1 and explicitly rejected compatibility-only code for older harness-server protocols. RFC review passed after adding atomic command/admission locking, producer-generation output fencing, generation-fenced renewal, an unambiguous pre-admission resend signal, and a bounded forced-takeover frame.

title: Publish extracted viewer Slackbot image
description: darkmatter-images.yml does not publish centaur-slackbotv2. Production remains on sha-4f92c8e3 and generates removed /console/apps/omp-stats export URLs despite the chart and env being updated. Add the Slackbot image job, publish main, then pin the resulting image in GitOps.
close_reason: Fixed by darkmatter/centaur PR #25. Main image workflow now publishes centaur-slackbotv2; merged release 61c00a57 produced verified GHCR tag and is live.

title: Diagnose OMP viewer production 502
description: GitOps PRs #104-#106 are merged and the tailnet device omp-viewer.tail6277a6.ts.net is online, but /healthz returns 502. Viewer image sha-7d2d298 passes CI and a local linux/amd64 container health smoke. Startup-before-sync and private GHCR pull-secret fixes are already deployed. Inspect Argo sync status, Deployment/ReplicaSet/Pod state, Service endpoints, events, and container logs in the production centaur namespace before making another change. This workstation only has docker-desktop/default kubectl contexts.
close_reason: Resolved: default kube context reaches production. Live Argo showed SOPS MAC ComparisonError, fixed in gitops PR #107. Argo now Synced/Healthy; pod ready; endpoints populated; /healthz, stats API/dashboard, and real transcript export verified.

title: Extract OMP viewer from Centaur
description: Move the OMP export/stats application, image build, and deployment ownership out of Centaur into a dedicated tailnet-only viewer repository. Remove app-proxy authentication and OMP workload code from Centaur; retain only transcript publication and external viewer links/config.
design: Two-stage extraction. Stage 1 moves the viewer app/image into a new darkmatter/omp-viewer repository and deployment into GitOps. Viewer is private HTTP behind a Tailscale HTTPS Ingress; no Centaur app proxy, per-thread authorization, admin stats gate, or public-exposure hardening. Centaur retains only transcript publication and configured external viewer links. Stage 2 separately audits collaboration components.
acceptance_criteria: Centaur no longer contains or builds services/omp-stats; no app proxy/auth path remains for the viewer; GitOps deploys a separately built tailnet-only viewer; export/stats behavior is smoke-tested through the external URL.
notes: User explicitly defines Tailscale access as the viewer authorization boundary: anyone able to access Centaur may access the viewer.

title: Build immutable native OMP collab relay image
description: Add a Centaur-owned container build for the exact upstream OMP collab-web relay/web implementation, pinned to an immutable oh-my-pi source revision. Publish ghcr.io/darkmatter/centaur-collab-relay:sha-<centaur-commit> through darkmatter-images.yml; do not duplicate the relay protocol or ship mutable tags.
acceptance_criteria: Dockerfile/build copies or builds native collab-web relay and web assets from a pinned immutable upstream revision; image runs unprivileged and exposes the documented port; targeted local build/smoke proves HTTP and WSS relay behavior; darkmatter-images workflow publishes a sha-pinned GHCR image; no mutable upstream source or placeholder tag remains.

title: Publish and consume collaboration-capable OMP
description: Land the upstream OMP collaboration RPC work, publish an immutable OMP release, and update Centaur's sandbox image pin to consume it. Do not let harness-server resident-host work depend on an unpublished local checkout or mutable package version.
acceptance_criteria: The OMP changes are merged and available at an immutable released version; Centaur pins that exact version in the sandbox build; the image build verifies omp/16.5.2; RPC collaboration start/status/stop are exercised from the built sandbox image; the previous OMP pin is absent from active build configuration.
notes:
Upstream implementation commit e88f1a8da is pushed to czxtm/oh-my-pi feat/omp-collab-rpc. PR #6120 was auto-closed because @czxtm is not vouched. Vouch request opened at https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/discussions/6121. Do not consume until vouched, reopened, merged, and immutably released.
Immutable fork release published and consumed.

RELEASE COORDINATES

- CI checks: CI success, Detect CI changes, Linearbot typecheck, Console CI, Graphite mergeability all PASS. Service-specific jobs correctly skipping (path-filtered).
- Resident-host and lifecycle code untouched.

NOT MERGED — parent will review/merge.
close_reason: Fork release v17.0.5-centaur.1 published from e88f1a8da with SHA-256-pinned CLI asset; Centaur PR #20 merged as e669b440; darkmatter-images run 29803430293 published agent image successfully; host and in-image RPC collab start/status/stop smoke passed.

title: Verify native OMP collaboration end to end
description: Exercise the published feature through a real Centaur session and a separate local OMP TUI. Cover joining, guest prompts, concurrent Centaur input policy, stop, transcript synchronization, and expected room loss on component restart.
acceptance_criteria: The printed omp join command connects a local TUI; host and guest observe the same collaborative turn; concurrent normal Centaur execution is safely rejected or queued rather than creating a second writer; /export and /stats include the resulting OMP transcript after synchronization; stop invalidates the link; pod and relay restart preserve transcript data while invalidating the room.
notes: Blocked on local E2E credentials: docker-desktop context verified; fresh origin/main worktree prepared; just up stops at bootstrap-secrets because OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN is absent, and op whoami reports no signed-in account. Do not use dummy credentials. Required next step: sign into 1Password and follow skill://run-centaur-dev secret bootstrap, then exercise join/guest/concurrency/export/stats/stop/restart acceptance path.

title: Print native omp join commands for sessions
description: Add the thin Centaur control surface that starts or reuses the session's native OMP room and prints one copyable local command: 'To join this session, run: omp join <capability-url>'. Stopping collaboration closes the room without spending an agent turn.
acceptance_criteria: From a real Centaur thread, starting collaboration returns exactly one shell-safe omp join command using the configured tailnet relay; retry returns the same live room rather than creating another; stop is idempotent; failures are explicit; no browser terminal, Console collaboration UI, or participant-management surface is introduced.
notes:
Implementation complete. PR #18 open on feat/omp-collab-command (based on origin/main). 41/41 tests pass, typecheck green. Awaits centaur-3w2.6 (api-rs routes) for end-to-end.
Added shared contract fixture (services/slackbotv2/test/fixtures/collab-contract.json) encoding the canonical API contract. 26 contract validation tests (collab-contract.test.ts) prove the slackbotv2 client types, routes, methods, field names, and ingress rules match the fixture. Total: 67 tests pass (41 behavior + 26 contract), typecheck green. Commit 722d03b3 pushed to PR #18.
Review blockers fixed (commit 65f95d69): (1) Thinking status cleared by handleCollabCommand via setAssistantStatus(thread,'',...) — 6 dispatch-level regression tests through handleSlackMessageHandoff. (2) 12 noUncheckedIndexedAccess tsgo errors fixed in contract test. 73 tests pass, typecheck clean. PR #18.
close_reason: Merged join command UX in PR #18 at 4a466e5e; 73 Slack behavior/contract tests and CI green.

comments.author: cooper
comments.text:
PR: https://github.com/darkmatter/centaur/pull/18
Branch: feat/omp-collab-command
Commit: e75ad71293da6a508dd00809689bd5db147d981e

Contract (locked with CollabRoomLifecycle + ResidentOmpHost):
- POST /api/session/{thread_key}/collab/start → {ok, thread_key, room: {active, join_url?, view_url?, web_url?, participants}}
- GET  /api/session/{thread_key}/collab/status → {ok, thread_key, room: CollabRoomState | null}
- POST /api/session/{thread_key}/collab/stop  → {ok, thread_key, stopped: boolean}
- Errors: 409 ownership, 400 terminal
- join_url is full omp join-capable URL from resident host; ingress forwards verbatim

Sample output: omp join 'https://relay.tailnet.test/r/room-abc.aGVsbG8='

Tests: 41 pass, 0 fail. Typecheck: green.
Depends on centaur-3w2.6 (api-rs route implementations).

title: Wire collaboration room lifecycle and keepalive
description: Connect OMP room lifecycle to Centaur session and sandbox lifecycle. An active room keeps the owning sandbox available; explicit stop releases the keepalive; owner, process, pod, or relay loss closes the room and records a visible terminal state. Rooms and capability URLs are intentionally not recovered.
acceptance_criteria: An active room prevents idle suspension; stop permits normal idle cleanup; terminal workflow sessions cannot start or join rooms; owner/process/pod/relay loss cannot leave a ghost keepalive; recovery resumes the OMP transcript but requires a new room and new capability URL.
notes:

Rebased onto origin/main (07426d00). Tip a60dde79 pushed PR21. collab_ 37/37 harness green. Monitoring CI.

title: Run resident OMP RPC hosts in harness-server
description: Add an OMP-specific persistent app-server adapter in harness-server. It starts or resumes one RPC process for the owned Centaur session, continuously drains unsolicited session and collaboration events, sends ordinary prompts/steers/interrupts through that process, and shuts down cleanly on ownership release.
acceptance_criteria: Multiple sequential Centaur turns reuse one OMP process; unsolicited collaboration events cannot block stdout; prompt, steer, interrupt, room control, process exit, and shutdown are normalized correctly; the adapter refuses to run without current session ownership; no behavior changes for other harnesses.
notes:
Completed adapter wiring: merged command/control into single OmpBlocksInput channel, wired steer (trace_metadata.action=steer_active_execution -> steer_command), abort, collab_start/status/stop with response correlation and ownership fencing. Removed all dead-code warnings. Added trusted api-rs ownership injection (SessionTraceContext::with_ownership injects owner_id+generation into trace_metadata after acquire_oneshot_session_ownership). 5 integration tests pass: process reuse (same PID), unsolicited collab_state, missing/stale ownership rejection, collab start/status/stop. 87 unit tests pass. Zero warnings. PR #19 updated (commit b6efe66b).
Real-binary smoke test PASSED: fork release v17.0.5-centaur.1 (SHA256 8e19613db2b1427d22c8d661ccf9c6bc259c2426ea7c0485e340a4508f23136a) installed at /tmp/omp-release-install. Real omp --mode rpc binary responds to collab_start with collab_state frame + response frame through the harness-server adapter. Test: resident_omp_real_binary_collab_status_and_ownership_fence (#[ignore]). Commit 4ce74de0 pushed to PR #19.
PR #19 review blockers fixed (commit after 4ce74de0): (1) ownership insert overwrite + malicious metadata regression; (2) interrupt ownership fence + missing/stale tests; (3) drive_omp_turn 120s settle + child-exit test. Also request_id correlation + webUrl for FinishRoomLifecycle contract. All 9 resident_omp tests + real binary smoke pass.
All ReviewResidentHostFinal items addressed (commit after d5c4f492). M1 prompt-id correlation; M2 real wire + stronger real-binary asserts; M3 thread_id errors; M4 collab/status shape; L1 bounded wait; L2 session resume + test; M5 lease docs. 10/10 resident_omp tests incl real binary pass.
All 7 ResidentFixVerifier blockers resolved (new commit). 87 unit + 11 resident_omp (incl real binary) + 9 api-rs ownership = all pass. Zero warnings. Fmt clean.
All 8 rereview blockers resolved. 87 unit + 11 resident_omp (incl real binary) + 9 api-rs = all pass. Fmt clean. Pushed.
Verifier-approved state-machine patch pushed. 87 unit + 14 resident_omp (incl real binary, OMP_BIN resume, active interrupt/steer, FIFO, failed prompt) all pass. CI pending.
Cross-PR request_id in error frames: write_blocks_error_with_request_id + ParseError carries request_id+command. 87 unit + 15 resident_omp (incl request_id wire test) all pass.
PR #22 updated: admitted ownership echoed on ALL collab outputs (state/status/error). 87 unit + 15 resident_omp all pass. Wire shape: params.ownership = {owner_id, generation}.
close_reason: Merged resident OMP RPC harness in PR #19 at 54a213bf; verifier-approved state machine and CI green.

title: Expose OMP collaboration hosting over RPC
description: Retain the mode-neutral CollabHost in OMP RPC mode and expose host control commands for collaboration start, status, and stop. Return the native join/view capability URLs and emit lifecycle frames needed by a long-running host. Joining remains a local TUI operation through the existing 'omp join' CLI.
acceptance_criteria: An OMP RPC client can start one room, receive a valid join URL, query status, and stop it; repeated start is idempotent; process/relay failure emits an unambiguous lifecycle event; RPC shutdown closes the room; no TUI object is instantiated; a real local 'omp join <url>' connects successfully.
notes: Correction: upstream PR https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/pull/6120 was auto-closed by the repository vouch gate, not accepted/merged. The implementation remains complete at fork commit e88f1a8da; publication/release is tracked by centaur-3w2.9 and vouch request https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/discussions/6121.
close_reason: Implemented and published upstream as can1357/oh-my-pi#6120; typecheck, 72 collaboration tests, and isolated real omp join smoke pass.

title: Deploy tailnet-only OMP collaboration relay
description: Deploy the native OMP collaboration relay and web client as a single-replica, memory-only service reachable only through Tailscale HTTPS/WSS. Do not add public ingress, Console SSO, or persistent room storage.
acceptance_criteria: A tailnet client can establish the native OMP WebSocket flow; a non-tailnet public request cannot reach the service; HTTPS/WSS work through Tailscale ingress; relay restart invalidates existing rooms as documented; GitOps validation and network-policy checks pass.
notes:
GitOps PR: https://github.com/darkmatter/gitops/pull/103 (commit 19af368, branch feat/omp-collab-relay). Deployed tailnet-only OMP collab relay/web: single-replica, memory-only, Tailscale HTTPS/WSS ingress only, least-privilege NetworkPolicy (tailscale proxy only, no egress), hardened pod security. Pattern mirrors omp-auth-broker. Validation: kubeconform -strict (6 resources, 0 errors), yq (all OK), git diff --check (clean). BLOCKED OPEN: no immutable native OMP collab-web image exists (verified across darkmatter/paradigmxyz/can1357 GHCR, npm, releases, Dockerfiles, CI). Did NOT hand-roll the relay protocol. Remaining gate: add services/collab-relay/Dockerfile + darkmatter-images.yml job in darkmatter/centaur to build ghcr.io/darkmatter/centaur-collab-relay:sha-<commit> from the upstream collab-web package (can1357/oh-my-pi packages/collab-web at a pinned tag), then update the sha-TODO tag in deployment.yaml and verify the tailnet WSS flow. The gitops manifests are correct and deployable once the image exists.
Image blocker RESOLVED: native collab-relay image published as ghcr.io/darkmatter/centaur-collab-relay:sha-80b22634750bc6f23ca0183f4c50248044e89b52 (PR darkmatter/centaur#17 merged, workflow 29759050367 success). Updated deployment.yaml placeholder to the exact sha tag, verified image present in GHCR. GitOps PR #103 updated (commit 83e454e). Validation green: kubeconform -strict (6 resources, 0 errors), yq (all OK), git diff --check (clean). Remaining gate: live tailnet WSS flow verification requires PR #103 merge + ArgoCD deploy + tailnet WSS smoke test.
close_reason: Deployed tailnet-only OMP collab relay/web (GitOps PR #103 merged as c8bddce). Argo root synced, application Synced, deployment available. Tailnet HTTPS healthz returned 200. Real WSS host+guest smoke at wss://omp-collab-relay.tail6277a6.ts.net/r/CentaurSmoke2026 passed: peer-joined peer 1; host close delivered room-closed and guest close 4001. Native collab-relay image ghcr.io/darkmatter/centaur-collab-relay:sha-80b22634750bc6f23ca0183f4c50248044e89b52 (built from upstream collab-web, PR darkmatter/centaur#17, workflow 29759050367). Validation: kubeconform -strict (6 resources, 0 errors), yq (all OK), git diff --check (clean). Security boundary: tailnet-only (no public ingress), least-privilege NetworkPolicy (tailscale proxy only, no egress), hardened pod security (non-root, readOnlyRootFilesystem, drop ALL caps), memory-only (no PVC, restart invalidates rooms), no Console SSO, no per-user DB.

title: Enforce exclusive OMP session ownership
description: Add a durable single-owner boundary for an OMP session and workspace. A resident collaboration host and the existing one-shot Slack/API harness must never concurrently resume or write the same OMP session. Ownership acquisition waits for any active execution to finish, and normal executions are rejected or queued while the resident owner holds the session.
design: Use an atomic api-rs ownership state with owner identity, generation/fencing value, lease expiry, and active mode. Route all normal execute, resume, interrupt, and collaboration acquisition paths through it. A clean full cutover to resident RPC may remove the one-shot path, but mixed-mode behavior must remain impossible during rollout and recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent acquisition has exactly one winner; ordinary omp -p execution cannot start against a resident-owned session; stale owners cannot commit session events or reacquire the workspace after fencing; release/checkpoint permits normal execution again; regression tests cover active execution, lease expiry, owner loss, and duplicate acquisition.
close_reason: Merged as b46a1a0a in PR https://github.com/darkmatter/centaur/pull/16. Implements durable session_owners fence (migration 0047), atomic single-owner acquisition with generation fencing, OMP-only one-shot execution gating, stale-owner event rejection, release/expiry reacquisition, adoption deferral against resident owners, handoff session-ownership release, and 9 targeted regression tests.

title: Extract mode-neutral OMP collaboration host context
description: Refactor OMP CollabHost so collaboration hosting is not coupled to InteractiveModeContext or TUI UI fields. Introduce a mode-neutral context containing session, session manager, event bus, context-usage provider, and lifecycle/notice callbacks; adapt the existing TUI path without changing its behavior.
acceptance_criteria: CollabHost has no dependency on InteractiveModeContext, statusLine, ui, updatePendingMessagesDisplay, or ctx.collabHost; existing TUI /collab, /join, and /leave behavior and tests remain intact; a non-TUI owner can retain and drive a CollabHost.
close_reason: Extracted a mode-neutral CollabHostContext, preserved the TUI adapter callbacks, and added a headless host regression test; all collaboration tests pass.

title: Enable native OMP collaboration for Centaur sessions
description: Allow a Centaur-hosted resident OMP process to create a native collaboration room and print a copyable 'omp join <capability-url>' command. Preserve single-writer session semantics, keep the room tailnet-only, and treat OMP JSONL as the authoritative collaborative transcript.
design: Centaur owns one resident OMP RPC host per active session. OMP exposes mode-neutral collaboration hosting through RPC; local users join from their normal TUI with 'omp join'. No Centaur web terminal, participant database, or guest-input bridge. Collaborative guest turns execute directly in OMP and synchronize through the existing transcript pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: A real Centaur session can start collaboration, print a working omp join command, accept a local TUI guest, stop the room, and recover safely from owner loss without allowing a second process to write the same OMP session or workspace.

title: Test upstream sync workflow
description: Manually dispatch the darkmatter/centaur sync upstream GitHub Action and verify its branch, PR, conflict, and summary behavior without rewriting main.
acceptance_criteria: The workflow_dispatch run completes green; its changed/no-op result matches current upstream ancestry; any sync PR is inspected and left in a safe actionable state; production deployment from the OMP docs fix remains green.

title: Avoid transient viewer 404 after transcript archive
description: Production E2E showed session.transcript_archived succeeded for console:omp-export-stats-prod-1784727442, but the tailnet viewer returned `unknown thread key` until its next 300-second corpus sync. Slack and Console publish direct export links immediately, so users can encounter a false 404 after a completed turn.
acceptance_criteria: After session.transcript_archived, a fresh /export/<thread> request becomes available promptly or returns an explicit retry/loading response; it must not present the corpus as permanently unknown during the normal sync window.

title: Fix omp:// docs resolution in sandbox
description: Production OMP smoke showed read of omp://session-operations-export-share-fork-resume.md and omp://user-facing-packages.md resolves to missing /usr/lib/node_modules/docs. The packaged CLI embeds the docs blob, but PI_DOCS_EMBED or resolver configuration does not select it in Centaur sandboxes; parent and both scouts had to decode dist/cli.js manually.
acceptance_criteria: A production-equivalent Centaur sandbox can read omp:// and both named documents directly without filesystem fallback; add focused regression coverage for the packaged-image environment.
notes:
Root cause: the immutable fork package declares bin.omp=src/cli.ts while omitting the repository docs directory; dist/cli.js contains the embedded docs index. Commit c47eb1a9 repoints /usr/bin/omp to the prepacked bundle and adds image-build smokes for omp://, both affected docs, and collab_start. Verified the final image in local k3s: all three reads succeeded (33,406 bytes total).
User expanded scope: push the fix and carry it through a green production deployment.

title: Differentiate transcript export icon
description: Console transcript export and Share chat currently use the same share icon. Use the existing link icon for export while preserving its label, tooltip, and behavior.
close_reason: Fixed by darkmatter/centaur PR #26. Export uses the existing link icon; Share chat retains the share icon. Regression test and full Console CI pass; image 2b3a01a4 deployed.

title: Upstream sync workflow: auto-merge, GitOps pin, Slack
description: Centaur durable workflow + thin GHA: merge upstream when CI green (merge commit + match-head-commit), summarize, wait images, bump gitops pins, verify Argo, Slack notify. Ledger is GitHub/GitOps not cross-run step state.
close_reason: Implemented in PRs https://github.com/darkmatter/centaur/pull/24 (engine: slackbotv2 image + enriched sync PR) and https://github.com/darkmatter/centaur-overlay/pull/9 (overlay: upstream_sync workflow + spec + 18 tests). Resume-aware state machine, merge-commit-only with --match-head-commit, external cross-run ledger, all 18 tests passing.
